data.content:
Implemented in worktree branch `codex/remove-plan-repopath-filter`.
Commit: `7de78183e46d8aa7666609302fb44af34b224b85`
Validation: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build` all passed in `/Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/remove-plan-repopath-filter`.
Summary: removed the redundant execution-plan `repo_path` equality filter from `listPlans()` and added a regression test proving legacy execution-plan knots without `repo_path` still appear on Setlist.
